input.prompt:
My .NET MAUI page shows blank labels even though my ViewModel properties
have values. Here is my XAML:
```xml
<ContentPage xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml">
    <VerticalStackLayout>
        <Label Text="{Binding Title}" />
        <Label Text="{Binding Description}" />
    </VerticalStackLayout>
</ContentPage>
```
What am I doing wrong?

My .NET MAUI page shows blank labels even though my ViewModel properties
have values. Here is my XAML:
```xml
<ContentPage xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml">
    <VerticalStackLayout>
```

data.reasoningText:
The user is asking about a common .NET MAUI data binding issue. The XAML looks correct syntactically, but the most likely problem is that the `BindingContext` is never set, so the bindings have nothing to resolve against.

There's also potentially a missing `INotifyPropertyChanged` implementation, but the most common cause of "blank labels" when properties have values is simply not setting the `BindingContext`.

Let me give a concise answer.
